holdings.infoBox: SPLV is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are FirstEnergy stock at 1.33%, Loews at 1.31%, Berkshire Hathaway at 1.29%, Duke Energy at 1.24%, and WEC Energy Group at 1.24%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF (SPLV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Low Volatility index. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of the 100 least-volatile stocks in the S&P 500. SPLV was launched on May 5, 2011 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: The Inflation Impact: 3 ETF Approaches for Managing Risk
data.text: It certainly seems like the threat of inflation won't be going away any time soon.  On Wednesday, June 10, the CPI numbers for May came out, showing that the index rose 0.5% for the month.

data.title: 3 Ways to Play the S&P 500 Based on Your Risk Tolerance
data.text: At first glance, the dynamic between the macroeconomic environment and the ETF market can feel like a tale of two conflicting stories. After all, the recent CPI and PPI reports seem to indicate that i...

data.title: These alternative index strategies are beating the S&P 500 after the stock market's new highs
data.text: Invesco has nine factor approaches to tracking the S&P 500. All but one have beaten the index this year, and two have stood out since the stock market's March 30 low.

data.title: Keep Calm and Carry On: This ETF is Cruising Past the S&P 500
data.text: The Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF and similar funds are outperforming the S&P 500 as investors seek safety amid market uncertainty.

data.title: Love your stock-index fund? It might be time to spice up your investment strategy.
data.text: There are easy and inexpensive ways to broaden your stock market exposure, even within the S&P 500.

data.title: These 2 ETF strategies can lower your risk during this period of stock-market uncertainty
data.text: This year's stock-market gyrations have underscored the importance of broad strategies that lower investors' risk through diversification, low volatility and income generation.

data.title: Using ETFs to capture momentum during the market's wild swings
data.text: September's seasonal volatility could challenge the Big Tech trade, but one low-volatility ETF is still betting big on it.

data.title: Final Trades: Live Nation, Delta Air Lines and SPLV
data.text: The Investment Committee gives you their top stocks to watch for the second half.

data.title: Best Low-Volatility ETFs for When the Market is a Roller Coaster
data.text: It's been a volatile few years for the stock market, and that has investors sniffing out low-volatility ETFs. Just understand their strengths and their limitations.
